title: Updated Roadmap
excerpt:
I cant see the updated roadmap, from july to december 2019.- 
I need to know where the API 2.0 improvements will be released (more type of columns, etc). 
It would be nice to see what news are coming!

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
I cant see the updated roadmap, from july to december 2019.-
I need to know where the API 2.0 improvements will be released (more type of columns, etc).
It would be nice to see what news are coming!

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Any updates on the Roadmap?

monday.com Work OS: the visual platform that manages everything is showing signs of neglect. Has not been updated for months.

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JohnW

The roadmap looks up to date to me. Can you check it again?

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Julia-monday.com

I check it most days. Haven’t seen any changes in recent weeks. Any you’re aware of?

Suggestion: Might help to add a Last Updated column so we can see recent updates.

Also the Last Quarter reference being Apr to Jun 2019 needs updating.

None of this is a criticism. Just keen to adopt new features into our boards when they’re available. Just seems that new features have arrived slower than usual recently…

posts.author: Galit-monday.com (Galit)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @JohnW! We’re always updating and releasing new features to the platform but in the recent months we’ve focused a lot on the quality and performance of the platform so we took a small break. We just resumed and are now building a lot of integrations to be released so please stay tuned! We also just released performance enhancements to the platform as well! But to recap, our public roadmap should be up to date Hope this helps!
